description_long: This is a modern, stealth-inspired military jet airplane with a sleek, angular design and a dark gray exterior. The wings are sharply swept back and integrated smoothly into the fuselage, giving it a blended wing body appearance. The cockpit is positioned at the front and features a tinted, streamlined canopy, likely for a single pilot. Twin jet engine exhausts are visible at the rear, flanked by vertical stabilizers that are canted outward. The surface is mostly smooth with subtle panel lines and minimal visible markings, except for small insignias on the wings. The overall form suggests high maneuverability and advanced aerodynamics, typical of next-generation fighter aircraft.
description: A sleek, dark gray stealth jet with swept-back wings, twin rear engines, and a forward cockpit under a tinted canopy.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed nose, forward cockpit canopy, and wide, sharply swept wings.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the streamlined fuselage, integrated wing design, and visible cockpit canopy.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying twin engine exhausts, outward-canted vertical stabilizers, and the full wingspan.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the smooth wing-fuselage blend and rear engine placement.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing, sharply swept delta wings with blended wing body and slight anhedral angle, no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines, rear-mounted with exhausts at the fuselage aft section.
attribute_tail_design: Twin outward-canted vertical stabilizers with no conventional horizontal stabilizer, forming a stealth-oriented tail configuration.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable landing gear, tricycle configuration implied by typical design, though gear is not visible in these views.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single-seat canopy integrated into the nose section.
